# Faynaz Technologies

> Dubai-based software studio delivering full-stack development, DevOps & cloud, and AI automation. Engagements run as a dedicated team (staff augmentation) or a managed service (fixed-scope delivery). Serving startups, SMEs, and enterprises across the UK, Australia, Netherlands, the Nordics, Singapore, the US, Canada, and the UAE.

## What we do
- Full-stack software development: web apps, SaaS platforms, MVPs, APIs.
- DevOps & cloud: CI/CD, Kubernetes, cloud migration, infrastructure as code, reliability.
- AI automation: workflow automation, AI agents, LLM integration, business process automation.

## How to work with us
- Dedicated Team: hire senior engineers (DevOps, AI/ML, full-stack) who plug into your team on a retainer.
- Managed Service: we scope, build, and deliver a defined outcome at a fixed price.

## Contact
- Book a discovery call: https://faynaztech.com/contact
- Email: contact@faynaztech.com
- Location: Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
